name: Amaretto Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, stir together warm water and instant coffee crystals.
2. Micro-cook the mixture uncovered on 100% power for about 4 minutes or until steaming hot.
3. Stir in the Amaretto.
4. Serve in mugs.
5. Top each mug of coffee mixture with some dessert topping.
